text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
During my rise to power as the next king, my
compatriot, Meisho Doto, suddenly storms the
stage! But then, just as we are establishing our
leading roles...

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I-impossible! The Golden Generation will bow out
of the Twinkle Series this year! Meaning... the
battlefield shall shift to the Dream Trophy
League?!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
This news overshadows my achievements. I cannot
let this stand!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I call a press conference and make my
declaration! I shall amass G1 victories, become
king, and put an end to the Golden Generation's
reign!
